title: Zootropolis runtime configuration
description: Read by scripts/dev.sh at server boot and exposed to Paperclip as environment variables. Each field maps to one ZOOTROPOLIS_* env var; env vars already set in the shell win over the file, so you can still override per-run.

strict.description: Enforce strict parent↔child issue assignment and per-agent issue visibility. Maps to ZOOTROPOLIS_DELEGATION_STRICT.

mode.description: 'mixed' (default): aliaskit_vm leaves may use either an external daemon endpoint or a dev-spawned local daemon. 'external_only': reject aliaskit_vm hires without adapterConfig.externalEndpoint. Maps to ZOOTROPOLIS_RUNTIME_MODE.

portRange.description: TCP range the port broker picks from for in-process dev daemons. Maps to ZOOTROPOLIS_PORT_RANGE_{START,END}.

agentsRoot.description: Directory where per-agent folders live (`.claude/`, `workspace/`, `memory.md`, `identity.json`, …). Tilde is expanded. Maps to ZOOTROPOLIS_AGENTS_ROOT.

useReal.description: Wire the real AliasKit API for identity provisioning. Default false = mock identities in identity.json. Maps to ZOOTROPOLIS_USE_REAL_ALIASKIT.
